name: codex-auto-router
description: Automatically decomposes Codex tasks across threads and routes bounded work from a Sol or Terra parent to Terra or Luna workers.

interface.shortDescription: Automatically route work across threads and subagents
interface.longDescription: Mention Auto Router and describe only the outcome. The active Sol or Terra parent chooses thread boundaries, Terra or Luna workers, permitted child usage, validation, and final integration.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this repository thoroughly and prioritize evidence-backed issue candidates. Do not change files.
Investigate and fix this bug, then run the relevant checks.
Use threads to process this large task set, then consolidate the results.
